Get In Touch →
A Program by HS108 × Experimental

off_menu

Projects that don't have a brief.
Ideas that don't belong in a client deck.
Design for things nobody asked us to design.

What Is off_menu?

Design without a client.

Design is too often defined by what clients ask for. off_menu exists for everything else.

It's a program for speculative projects — the kind of work that starts with "what if?" rather than a brief. We design typefaces for spoken language. We redesign civic systems. We build interfaces for senses that don't usually get interfaces.

Some of it is genuinely useful. Some of it is just interesting. All of it is honest.

The name is intentional: these projects are off the menu — not because they're secret, but because you can't order them. They happen when the idea is ready.

Projects

OM-001 In Progress

A Typeface for Spoken Language

Designing a variable typeface that responds to prosody data — pitch, rhythm, and emphasis — from speech recordings.

Type Design × Linguistics
OM-002 Concept

The Voter's Interface

A speculative redesign of India's electoral information systems — from EVMs to result dashboards. What if civic design was actually good?

Civic Design × Systems
OM-003 Research

Smell as UI

An experimental project exploring olfactory interaction — can smell be a meaningful output layer in ambient computing environments?

Interaction Design × Hardware
OM-004 Completed

The Unboxing Economy

Packaging design for products that don't exist yet — a forward-looking exercise in material, ritual, and identity for speculative objects.

Packaging × Futures

Have a wild idea?

off_menu projects occasionally come from outside HS108 — collaborators who bring a strange question, an unusual material, or a domain we've never worked in before.

If your idea sounds weird in a good way, we want to hear it.

contact.studio@hs108.in Or use the contact form

What makes a good off_menu project?

  • It doesn't fit any existing service category
  • The question is more interesting than the answer
  • No client would ever pay for it
  • It teaches us something we couldn't learn on a brief
  • It's genuinely strange

Start a Project

Looking for client work? That's elsewhere.

off_menu is for the wild stuff. For design that scales businesses, visit our services.

Get In Touch contact.studio@hs108.in

building brands & products that scale.
